title: rubus × perdubius
intro: Rubus × perdubius, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis), resulting in a unique and adaptable plant. The medicinal properties of Rubus × perdubius include its high antioxidant content, anti-inflammatory properties, and ability to aid in digestion. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × perdubius include its potential to reduce the risk of heart disease, lower blood pressure, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, Rubus × perdubius is often used to make jams, jellies, and teas, and its leaves and roots can be dried and used as a supplement or added to herbal remedies.
